heading: General regulations
label: 1624 General regulations
text: In addition to the specific powers conferred by this chapter the Secretary of the Treasury is authorized to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , . That section was superseded by section 624 of act , comprising this section, and repealed by section 651(a)(1) of the 1930 act.act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 356, title IV, § 62342 Stat. 988June 17, 1930
